context: Tests whether swift-codable guidance corrects API response model conformance, scoped decoder configuration, status validation, date decoding, key mapping, and generic envelope decoding without broad networking overreach.

checklist.name: Read-only conformance
checklist.description: Uses Decodable rather than Codable for read-only API response models unless encoding is actually required.

checklist.name: Status before decode
checklist.description: Validates HTTPURLResponse status before attempting JSON decoding and treats HTTP failures separately from transport failures.

checklist.name: Date strategy
checklist.description: Configures JSONDecoder.dateDecodingStrategy to match ISO 8601 date strings instead of relying on the default date strategy.

checklist.name: Initialism key mapping
checklist.description: Definitively explains that convertFromSnakeCase maps image_url to imageUrl, not imageURL, and uses CodingKeys for the imageURL property.

checklist.name: Scoped envelope decode
checklist.description: Shows or describes generic APIResponse<T> envelope decoding with the decoder and response data in scope, explicitly correcting the out-of-scope decoder bug.

checklist.name: Scope control
checklist.description: Keeps the correction focused on Codable decoding rather than expanding into a full networking architecture redesign.
